The first strategy is what most people, when you think about internet marketing, you think of. You go out there and you do a product launch or you buy some emails and you get a whole big surge of traffic like this. Then it all times it dies back down unless you keep buying traffic and things like that. That's usually like either a launch type model or buying, you know, renting email ads, things like that. You get a big reward really, really quickly. So motivate you, get you excited, you see some cash. That's why when I teach most of my students, I focus on do solo ads. Because I need you guys getting, you know, you need that little fix of cash. You need to make some money because if you get that, you're going to be a thousand times more happy. But right now I'm not going to because I just want to go for the low hanging fruit. I start going through again. Gold, Boolean investments. Again, it's got a green light. I start going through all these. Now what I'm looking for, just so you guys know, there's a couple of criteria points I'm looking for. The first one is I want to make sure that I'm going after the right keyword, like a buyer keyword. So this is something that's, it's not something that I can explain. But you have to kind of think on your own. So a buyer keyword, for example, if you were to Google and type in gold, you know, what is that? You're looking, it could be gold rings, could be gold diamonds, gold investments. It could be a million different things related to gold, right? So it's not really a buying keyword. It's just random thing. So I want a keyword that someone's searching for if they want to buy a product. So if I'm selling a product about gold investments, what would someone be searching for? They might be searching for gold investments or how to invest in gold or things like that. So the first thing is I want to make sure that these are words that potentially could be buyer keywords. That person is actually trying to buy something. Okay, what's the buyer intent? Okay, and so you kind of, when I look at these keywords, I look at it and say, okay, gold bullion investment. Is that the kind of person that I want? Yeah, that's probably the kind of person I want. They're looking to invest in gold bullion. Okay, that might be someone I'm looking for. Gold investment, you know, gold investing. A lot of these are going to be good buyer keywords. So something over here like gold jewelry, if you look on the related keywords, is gold jewelry. That's not going to be the person I want. I don't want someone who wants to buy gold jewelry. That's not how I'm looking for it. It's not the right buyer. Okay, but investing in gold is. So that's the first thing. Does that keyword have buyer intent? You can just know that by kind of looking at it, thinking does that sound like someone's going to come and buy my product when they be looking for that keyword. Okay, that's the first thing. The second thing I look for is I want to make sure it gets at least a thousand searches a month. Okay, if it's under a thousand searches a month, it's probably not worth my time and effort right now to go and build a whole site around it. Okay, now if it's above a thousand, that's like boom, that's a gold mine. Okay, so I'm going to look through here. There's one keyword I found here that's like the sweet spot that I'm really excited about. What's going to happen is all you guys on here are going to ruin it for me. There's a ton of places you can create pages on, but you just need to create at least one page. So I'm going to show you guys how to do two different pages with you guys right now. I'm going to do a YouTube video and I'm going to do creating a whole domain from scratch. I'm going to show you guys those two things really quick. But again, the other ones you can do just as well. Just go to any of the sites here in the handout and just go and walk through the site. They're all very simple. You create a page on any one of these sites and it works very, very easily. Some people are asking why would you want a whole bunch of different pages? Let me show you why you want a bunch of pages. Have you ever been to Google before? You type in a keyword. So when you come here, you type in your keyword and you see the 10 results. So you got do this number one, do number two, the latest number three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, 10. Obviously, you want to get to number one spot, right? There's only one thing that's better than being at the number one spot. Can you guess what that is? The thing is better is being at all of the spots or multiple spots. So my goal is for the keyword, for example, my keyword, how to invest in gold, my goal is not just to be number one. My goal obviously is to be number one. I want to be number one right here. I want this to be my golden sequence page. But then I want, I'm going to create a whole separate site. I want that one to show up here. I want my YouTube video show right here. I want my squadoo lens to show up right here. I want to dominate as much of this home page as possible. So if I create one page, I can create, I can, ooh, my mouse just jumped in that one. If I create one page, I can go and I can dominate one site. If I create multiple pages, I can dominate multiple different listings on that page in Google. Does that make sense, you guys? So that's the reason why. To get started, if you're overwhelmed at all, if this is your first time, just create one page. Okay? And get created the one that's most easy for you, the one that's most exciting for you. And then for those of you who get more into this and get excited, then create multiple pages. Create two or three and follow the exact same linking process I'll show you. But keep doing that and it'll keep increasing. You keep getting more and more pages on there. Because I think when you do the stats, I don't know on the top of my head, but it's something like, the first dude here gets like 70% of the traffic. The second one gets like 10% and then 5%. And then it's like two, two, two, two, all these other things, right? So obviously, I want as much of that traffic as possible. So I'm going to try to rank multiple pages. So that's why we create multiple different pages. Okay, so it's pretty simple there. Okay, so let me jump back over here. So there's some other places again to do it. I'm going to show you guys a couple ways that we do it. Okay, so the first one I'm going to show you is how to create a brand new domain from scratch. So what I use is I like to use Jaxie here because one of the cool things about Jaxie is they will do. If you find out, okay, how to invest in gold is the keyword that I want to go after. Every little tab here says domain search. It says find domain. If I click on that, you'll actually go and find a bunch of domains that have those keywords in it. Okay, so how to invest in gold.com, not available, not available, not available, but hey, this one's available, this one's available. And if it's available, it'll let you go and actually buy them. Okay, and one thing I do want to kind of, I want to kind of put out there. This used to be a lot more important than it is today. Okay, even a month ago, a month and a half ago, having your keywords in your domain was really, really important. With Google's new update, the new Penguin update, that's one of the things they kind of knocked back score on. So it's not as important today as it used to be to have the exact keywords in your domain. Okay, so what that means is a month and a half, two months ago, I had to, I wanted to make sure I had had how to invest in gold.com. I want to make sure I had that domain or how to invest in gold.something.com. How to invest in gold.secrets.com. I wanted to make sure I was in there. Today, that's not necessary for a feeder site anymore, okay, because that's one of the things that they Google just, you know, they stopped caring about. So you can still do it. In fact, I still do it just so I can remember what the feeder site's about, but it's not necessary. Okay, so for me, I went last night, I did my homework to make sure that everything was ready for you guys for this webinar. I did this process and went and I bought how to invest in gold.x.com. So it doesn't really matter. The biggest thing to know is goDaddy is going to try to upset you on a billion different things. Say no to everything except for the domain name and the hosting. Unless you have hosting somewhere else. But those are the only things to say yes to. Everything else they try to sell you say no to. They try to sell you privacy packages and emails and all these things that you don't need to say no to. All of them except for the domain name and the hosting. Only things you need. And again, they've got great support so they can walk you through to make sure that you buy. And if they try to upsell you to say, my coach told me no. And that's all you got to do. that still this video or post it or scrape it whatever, I'll still get customers from those videos, so I have a little annotation in there, down here you notice again I have the description, the description I want to make sure the URL is in there where I want people to go and then I just kind of talk, I just have a little brief description about what they can learn by going to that URL, okay so for Vigon this is one of our, actually one of our people who used it, for 27 years he's been cursing cold sores, I've never found anything that works better for cold sores than this cold sores app or thing, Vigon.com I use a bunch of cold sores, I promise it works, man I hate cold sores, you know what I said cold sores like 10 times in there, okay, we were trying to obviously rank for the keyword cold sores, okay, so that's the third point on YouTube video is the description, and the fourth thing is your tags, okay see these tags down here, now this is something I learned from Perry Belcher, it's called tag ripping, so check this out, if I go to YouTube right here, and I'll see what's the keywords I want to rank for, okay so if I want to rank for how to invest in gold, I want this to rank kind in YouTube, I go to, I just go type in how to invest in gold.com, I go to the person that's ranked number one right now, I click on their video, and then I come down here and I look to see what their tags are, let's see if I can find his tags, is that funny when you're trying to do something, there it is, okay, so these are the tags, so we know that Google already ranked these guys number one for the keyword I want to rank for, by having these tags, so all I'm going to do is I'm going to use these exact same tags, I'm going to rip them and use them in my video, okay we call it tag ripping, okay, so check out buy gold, gold, gold, blue yarn how to invest, gold IRA, how to retire, retire, so those are the keywords, the tags that he focused on, so I made my video, guess what I did, I used the exact same tags, because Google's already proven that those tags work, so boom, buy gold, gold, blue yarn how to invest, gold IRA, how to retire, retire, see so all my tags are in there, exact, because I knew that's what they were ranking for, I just kind of copied them and modeled them, okay, so boom, now I've got a page on YouTube, you see how he said it was, cost me five bucks, took me like 30 seconds of my own effort, again the core things are the headline in your YouTube video, so make sure you have your keyword there, so invest in gold is the keyword I made, there's my video which again the video is the least important part of the whole page, then you have your description, so I put the URL in here, goldsilversecrets.com, free video reveals a little known almost magic secret that practically forces people to sell their gold for 15 to 75 cents on the dollar, and then quickly flip it for 98 cents in less than two weeks, okay, so there's my description that pushes people I want to go, and then I got my tags that I ripped from other videos, and boom, now this page is created, it's optimized perfectly, okay, you see that, so in that fast, you know, with a $5 investment for an article, $5 investment for a video, I'm in $10 right now, $15 if I made another one for my blog post, I've created three pages, okay, I created a feeder site that was a brand new site, a feeder site that was a link on my golden sequence site, and a YouTube video, okay, so I've got three pages right now that I can go on rank, and again now I know my keyword, I'm gonna go rank these three pages and try to get them number one in Google, okay, do you see how that kind of works? That's the first step in this green light strategy, okay, it's not that difficult, and again like I said, the nicest thing about this is something you can easily outsource, you guys don't have to come masters of this, okay, if you guys think that I spend most of my time buying domains, setting up WordPress blogs, and writing articles, I don't, we've got some amazing people that do those things for us, and they've come through, they do this accent process you guys are learning right now, okay, so there's some very important tools, so some tools that we've shared with you guys so far, the first one is JAXI, okay, JAXI is an amazing tool for you to find out what keywords you can rank for that are getting traffic, okay, the worst thing you can do is go and rank for a keyword that nobody's looking for, okay, I see some of the local markets all the time, and it makes me sad, like, because my dad's an insurance agent, right, so he gets phone calls all the time from people who are like, hey, we'll rank you number one in Google, and so, you know, for $20, some crazy like that, so he's like, alright, so he pays $20, and they go and they rank him for insurance agent, living in Murray, Utah, okay, how many people do you think a month's search for insurance agent living in Murray, Utah? Okay, there's none, nobody's ever searched that in the history of the world, yet my dad's an one for a few other, he paid money for that, okay, that's like the big scam of the SEO world, this is nice because JAXI will actually let you know which keywords are people already searching for, okay, and then you only spend effort on those ones, okay, so this one I hear that we saw, how to invest in gold, 29,000 searches a month, I get 5,000 clicks a month if I'm on page one, okay, now if I'm on page one, but I'm number one, two, and three, what does that mean, do you guys think? 15, 20,000 clicks a month I'm getting for that one keyword, okay, now 15,000 clicks a month, for those of you who bought solo ads or you paid money for traffic other places through Facebook, a lot of times it's a dollar click, that's $15,000 a month in free traffic you're getting by being ranked up here, okay, what did it take so far, okay, it took a $5 investment for each one of these pages if I didn't want to write it myself, or I could write it myself and it doesn't cost me anything, okay, so that's the first step, there's another step that's going to go to get these pages ranked, that's the key concept I want you guys to get is that we're really empowering you guys to start doing this, okay, so the first tool again is JAXI, JAXI.com lets you find out which keywords to actually focus on.
